description: TON protocol registry (WS-2). Mirrors the protocol-registry.json intent for TON: proxy-TON (pTON) masters net to native TON so they never surface as a phantom held jetton; DeFi vault/router addresses drive counterparty protocol labels and stake/unstake classification. Keyed by TON address in ANY canonical form (raw workchain 0:hex, or friendly EQ/UQ) — TonAddressCanonicalizer expands each configured key to its equivalent forms, so a lookup by the toncenter raw form resolves a friendly-configured entry and vice versa. TON addresses are case-sensitive and are never lowercased.
protocols_note: DeFi vault/router addresses go under 'protocols' keyed by TON address. family=STAKING vaults classify wallet<->vault jetton moves as STAKING_DEPOSIT/WITHDRAW; family=DEX routers label swap counterparties. Affluent (affGOLDm staking) is mechanism-ready: add its confirmed vault master under 'protocols' with family STAKING once verified — it has no occurrences in the current dataset so no address is fabricated.
